creator: alexanderchuranov@gmail.com
text:
Jan,

I'd like to propose not checking this patch in right now.
Currently Boost in ports is out of sync with upstream. The patch to
update Boost to 1.48 is being tested.

The suggested changes in devel/boost-jam are included in the patch and
will be checked in as a part of update process. Current (not final,
probably) version of patch is here:
http://alexanderchuranov.com/boost-port/boost-145-to-148-v03.diff

Alexander Churanov,
maintainer of devel/boost-*
